review_question: Does the notice identify the entity and its role as controller processor joint controller or equivalent operational role?
expected_evidence: Company identity, controller role, contact point, applicable services
recommendation_scope: Privacy Notice Wording;PDP Officer / Privacy Governance
suggested_owner: Legal / Compliance;Data Protection Officer / PDP Function

review_question: Does the notice classify general and specific personal data clearly?
expected_evidence: Data category list, sensitive or specific data indicators

review_question: Does the notice explain identity legal basis purpose and accountability of the party requesting data?
expected_evidence: Identity, legal basis, purpose, accountability explanation

review_question: Does the notice explain correction access deletion withdrawal objection to automated decision-making restriction and claim or compensation channels?
expected_evidence: DSAR section, contact channel, process or SLA
recommendation_scope: Privacy Notice Wording;Data Subject Rights / DSAR Process

review_question: Does the notice specify the basis of processing for each major processing purpose?
expected_evidence: Consent, contract, legal obligation, vital interest, public interest, legitimate interest
keywords: dasar pemrosesan;dasar hukum;persetujuan;kontrak;kewajiban hukum;kepentingan vital;kepentingan publik;kepentingan sah;legal basis;consent
required_terms: dasar hukum|dasar pemrosesan|legal basis|lawful basis;persetujuan|consent|kontrak|kewajiban hukum|kepentingan sah;tujuan|purpose

review_question: If relying on consent does the notice disclose legality purpose type relevance retention collected information details processing period and rights?
expected_evidence: Consent-specific disclosure elements

review_question: Does the notice or supporting evidence show explicit written or recorded consent and proof of consent?
expected_evidence: Consent mechanism, logs, withdrawal method

review_question: Does the notice explain special handling for children or persons with disabilities where applicable?
expected_evidence: Parent or guardian consent, accessible communication
recommendation_scope: Privacy Notice Wording;Consent Mechanism;Legal Review Required

review_question: Are collection and processing limited specific lawful transparent and aligned to stated purposes?
expected_evidence: Clear purpose table, no vague excessive purposes

review_question: Does the notice explain how users can update or correct inaccurate data?
expected_evidence: Update or correction process, timing if stated

review_question: Does the notice explain access to data and processing history where relevant?
expected_evidence: Access channel, copy request, record or log mention
recommendation_scope: Privacy Notice Wording;Data Subject Rights / DSAR Process

review_question: Does the notice indicate automated decision-making profiling specific data large-scale processing matching new technology or rights-impacting processing?
expected_evidence: Automated decision or profiling disclosures, DPIA flag
recommendation_scope: Automated Decision-Making / Profiling;DPIA / High-Risk Processing;Legal Review Required
suggested_owner: Data Protection Officer / PDP Function;Management / Risk Committee

review_question: Does the notice disclose reasonable security safeguards without overclaiming?
expected_evidence: Security statement, confidentiality, access controls, no unsupported absolute claims

review_question: Does the notice explain withdrawal restriction end of processing deletion destruction and notification?
expected_evidence: Retention period or criteria, deletion request, withdrawal process
recommendation_scope: Privacy Notice Wording;Retention and Deletion Governance;Data Subject Rights / DSAR Process
suggested_owner: Legal / Compliance;Data Governance;Customer Service / DSAR Team

review_question: Does the notice explain breach notification or at least avoid contradicting breach obligations?
expected_evidence: Breach notification wording, internal incident process if supplied

review_question: Does the notice assign accountability and provide contact or governance ownership?
expected_evidence: DPO or privacy contact, accountability statement
recommendation_scope: PDP Officer / Privacy Governance;Privacy Notice Wording
suggested_owner: Data Protection Officer / PDP Function;Legal / Compliance

review_question: Does the notice explain data transfer in merger acquisition restructuring or dissolution contexts?
expected_evidence: M&A transfer disclosure and notice commitment

review_question: Does the notice identify processors service providers or third parties and explain processing under controller instruction?
expected_evidence: Vendor categories, processor role, safeguards

review_question: If triggers are met does the organization identify a PDP function or contact?
expected_evidence: PDP officer, privacy function, contact channel
recommendation_scope: PDP Officer / Privacy Governance;Legal Review Required
suggested_owner: Data Protection Officer / PDP Function;Legal / Compliance

review_question: Does the notice disclose domestic and overseas transfer and safeguards?
expected_evidence: Transfer countries or categories, safeguards, consent fallback if relevant
recommendation_scope: Cross-Border Transfer Governance;Privacy Notice Wording;Legal Review Required
suggested_owner: Legal / Compliance;Data Protection Officer / PDP Function

review_question: Does the assessment identify legal exposure for mapped gaps without overstating final liability?
expected_evidence: Administrative sanction reference as context
